inputs.name: backgroundDesign
inputs.description:
The background design of the component
Options include: 'solid' | 'translucent' | 'transparent'
The default is set to 'solid'

inputs.name: collapseTitleEndBtn
inputs.description: title for collapsed state of the button between mid and end column

inputs.name: collapseTitleStartBtn
inputs.description: title for collapsed state of the button between start and mid column

inputs.name: expandTitleEndBtn
inputs.description: title for expanded state of the button between mid and end column

inputs.name: expandTitleStartBtn
inputs.description: title for expanded state of the button between start and mid column

inputs.name: layout
inputs.description:
The layout of the component
Options include: 'OneColumnStartFullScreen' | 'OneColumnMidFullScreen' |
'OneColumnEndFullScreen' | 'TwoColumnsStartExpanded' | 'TwoColumnsMidExpanded' |
'TwoColumnsEndExpanded' | 'ThreeColumnsMidExpanded' | 'ThreeColumnsEndExpanded' |
'ThreeColumnsStartMinimized' | 'ThreeColumnsEndMinimized'

inputs.name: layoutDefinitions
inputs.description: Mapping of the layout name and the column layout in %

inputs.name: lgBreakPoint
inputs.description:
User-defined break point for LG screens
the default (Fiori 3) value is 1280

inputs.name: smBreakPoint
inputs.description:
User defined break point for SM screens
Default (Fiori 3) value is 960

outputs.name: layoutChange
outputs.description: The event emitted on layout value change.
